prestazioni: Engine swap to 1NZ-FE (1.5L) with a custom-built HKS GT-SS turbo kit (GT2560R-5 turbocharger, 350cc HKS injectors, HKS 264° camshafts, and a HKS Racing Suction Reloaded intake manifold) paired with a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU for precise boost control (targeting 1.2 bar) and fuel mapping, achieving ~220 hp at the wheels on 98 RON fuel.

Full custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Fujitsubo (Giken homologated) with a 4-2-1 header design, 200-cell catalytic converter, and a single 120mm titanium-tipped muffler (Fujitsubo Legalis R) to optimize scavenging while maintaining JDM compliance.

KW Variant 3 coilovers (8-position rebound, 16-level compression damping) with custom spring rates (6kg/mm front, 5kg/mm rear) and reinforced top mounts (Cusco pillowball) for improved turn-in response, paired with a Cusco 22mm front sway bar and Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (20mm) to eliminate understeer in tight corners.
estetica: Vertex Lang II widebody kit (Passo Sette-specific, 30mm front/40mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (Seibon) and a 50mm extended front bumper lip (TRD-inspired, but custom-molded for the Passo Sette’s chassis) to accommodate 17x8.5 ET35 Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (staggered setup: 225/40 front, 245/35 rear) with Toyo R888R tires.

Full custom aero package by Rocket Bunny (Passo Sette-specific, not the generic V3 kit) including a duckbill rear spoiler (carbon fiber, 30mm height) and side skirts with integrated air curtains (to reduce drag by 8% at 120 km/h, validated in wind tunnel testing).

Interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (Passo Sette-specific mounting brackets, no drilling required), a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel (with a Works Bell quick-release hub), and a custom roll cage (Cusco Type-HR, 6-point bolt-in) wrapped in Alcantara (MOMO Red) with red contrast stitching, paired with a Defi BF Advance multi-gauge pod (boost, oil temp, and AFR) mounted on the A-pillar.
